/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear
from sympy.sets.handlers.intersection import intersection_sets

f = n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I
s1 = imageset(Lambda(n, f), S.Integers)
print('s1:', s1)
print('s1 repr:', repr(s1))
print('s1 type/args:', type(s1), s1.args)
print('2 membership:', s1.contains(2), 2 in s1)
r = s1.intersect(S.Reals)
print('intersection:', r)
print('intersection repr:', repr(r))
print('intersection type/args:', type(r), r.args)
print('2 membership in intersection:', r.contains(2), 2 in r)
print('-1,1 membership:', r.contains(-1), r.contains(1))

n_ = Dummy(n.name, real=True)
f_ = f.subs(n, n_)
re, im = f_.as_real_imag()
im = expand_complex(im)
re, im = re.subs(n_, n), im.subs(n_, n)
print('re/im:', re, im, repr(im), Mul.make_args(im))
roots = [solve_linear(i, 0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols]
print('solve_linear factors:', roots)
x, xis = zip(*roots)
print('x:', x, 'xis:', xis)
print('FiniteSet(xis):', FiniteSet(xis), repr(FiniteSet(xis)))
print('FiniteSet(*xis):', FiniteSet(*xis), repr(FiniteSet(*xis)))
print('Integers - FiniteSet(xis):', S.Integers - FiniteSet(xis), repr(S.Integers - FiniteSet(xis)))
print('Integers intersect roots:', S.Integers.intersect(FiniteSet(*xis)))
print('direct dispatched handler:', intersection_sets(s1, S.Reals), repr(intersection_sets(s1, S.Reals)))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import S, I, Lambda, imageset, FiniteSet, ImageSet, ConditionSet, Eq
from sympy.abc import n, x
cases = [
    imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I), S.Integers),
    imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)*I), S.Integers),
    imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)*(n + 1)*I), S.Naturals0),
    imageset(Lambda(n, n/2 + ((n - 1)*(n + S.Half)).expand()*I), S.Integers),
]
for s in cases:
    print('set:', s)
    print('intersection:', s.intersect(S.Reals))
    print('subset:', s.is_subset(S.Reals))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import S, I
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.core.mul import Mul
im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
fs = [
 n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I,
 n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),
 n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),
]
for f in fs:
 print('\\nf=', f)
 print('together/cancel?', f)
 print('denoms:', denoms(f))
 for d in denoms(f):
  print(' d', d, 'factors', Mul.make_args(d), 'solutions', [solve_linear(q,0) for q in Mul.make_args(d) if n in q.free_symbols])
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import S, I, Dummy
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms
im0=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
fs = [
 n/(1/n-1)+im0*(n+1)*I,
 n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),
 n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),
]
for f in fs:
 nr=Dummy('n',real=True)
 re, im = f.subs(n,nr).as_real_imag()
 im=expand_complex(im).subs(nr,n)
 print('\\nf=',f)
 print('re=', re.subs(nr,n))
 print('im=',im, 'factor=', im.factor())
 print('denoms f=', denoms(f))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n, x
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear

im0 = (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)
cases = [
 ('factor2', n + (n-1)*(n+1)*I),
 ('factor2b', n + im0*I),
 ('factor3', n + im0*(n+1)*I),
 ('expanded nonlinear', n/2 + im0.expand()*I),
 ('rational1', n/(1/n-1) + im0*(n+1)*I),
 ('rational2', n/(n-6) + (n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),
 ('rational3', n/(n**2-9) + (n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),
]
for name, f in cases:
    s = ImageSet(Lambda(n, f), S.Integers)
    n_ = Dummy('n', real=True)
    re, im = f.subs(n,n_).as_real_imag()
    re, im = re.subs(n_,n), expand_complex(im).subs(n_,n)
    print('\\n', name)
    print('f =', f)
    print('re =', re, 'im =', im, 'im factors =', Mul.make_args(im))
    print('linear results =', [solve_linear(j,0) for j in Mul.make_args(im) if n in j.free_symbols])
    print('denoms =', denoms(f))
    for d in denoms(f):
        if d.has(n):
            print(' denom', d, 'factors/results', [(j, solve_linear(j,0)) for j in Mul.make_args(d) if n in j.free_symbols])
    try:
        out = s.intersect(S.Reals)
        print('current out =', repr(out))
    except Exception as e:
        print('current exception =', type(e).__name__, e)
PY"

from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n, x
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear

im0 = (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)
cases = [
 ('factor2', n + (n-1)*(n+1)*I),
 ('factor2b', n + im0*I),
 ('factor3', n + im0*(n+1)*I),
 ('expanded nonlinear', n/2 + im0.expand()*I),
 ('rational1', n/(1/n-1) + im0*(n+1)*I),
 ('rational2', n/(n-6) + (n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),
 ('rational3', n/(n**2-9) + (n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),
]
for name, f in cases:
    s = ImageSet(Lambda(n, f), S.Integers)
    n_ = Dummy('n', real=True)
    re, im = f.subs(n,n_).as_real_imag()
    re, im = re.subs(n_,n), expand_complex(im).subs(n_,n)
    print('\\n', name)
    print('f =', f)
    print('re =', re, 'im =', im, 'im factors =', Mul.make_args(im))
    print('linear results =', [solve_linear(j,0) for j in Mul.make_args(im) if n in j.free_symbols])
    print('denoms =', denoms(f))
    for d in denoms(f):
        if d.has(n):
            print(' denom', d, 'factors/results', [(j, solve_linear(j,0)) for j in Mul.make_args(d) if n in j.free_symbols])
    try:
        out = s.intersect(S.Reals)
        print('current out =', repr(out))
    except Exception as e:
        print('current exception =', type(e).__name__, e)
PY"
